message:
feat(server): ATC operator runtime, web dashboard mirror, TUI performance and ATC observability

atc.rs: DecisionCore migrated from HashMap<(A,S), f64> to dense
row-major Vec<f64> loss matrix with O(1) indexed lookups, eliminating
per-decide hash lookups.  New methods: posterior_probability,
set_loss_entry, sync_policy_from.  update_posterior replaces HashMap
likelihood scan with linear search (likelihoods are typically tiny).
AgentLivenessEntry gains a `program` field for hierarchical priors.
AtcEngine::register_agent now updates existing entries on program
change and syncs liveness policy via sync_policy_from.  New
seeded_rhythm constructor uses population statistics when available.

lib.rs: Add ATC operator runtime lifecycle (start_atc_operator_runtime
/ stop_atc_operator_runtime) integrated into all three server entry
points (stdio, http, http_with_tui).  The operator thread ticks the
ATC engine at a configurable interval, captures snapshots into a
global AtcOperatorSnapshot, and logs actionable ATC advisories to the
TUI event ring.  Snapshot includes agent liveness, deadlock cycles,
decision counts, tick budget, and recent actions with cooldown-based
deduplication.

tui_web_dashboard.rs: New module implementing a browser-based TUI
mirror.  WebDashboardFrameStore captures rendered ftui::Buffer cells
into packed u32 arrays.  HTTP endpoints: GET /web-dashboard serves a
self-contained HTML page with canvas rendering and keyboard forwarding;
GET /web-dashboard/state returns JSON frame snapshots with long-poll
since=seq optimization; POST /web-dashboard/input forwards keyboard
events to the TUI via the existing ws-input parser.

tui_app.rs: After each view() render, capture the frame buffer into
the web dashboard frame store with the current screen index.

tui_bridge.rs: TuiSharedState gains web_dashboard_frame field and
accessor for the web dashboard frame store.

tui_ws_state.rs: Snapshot and delta payloads now include the ATC
operator snapshot under the "atc" key.  Tests verify presence.

tui_screens/mod.rs: contains_ci optimized with first-byte pre-filter
before eq_ignore_ascii_case window scan.

tui_screens/agents.rs: Filter and sort use shared contains_ci/cmp_ci
helpers instead of per-call to_ascii_lowercase allocations.  Test
assertions simplified.

tui_screens/dashboard.rs: Hot-path filter uses new
text_matches_query_terms_exact for pre-lowercased haystacks, skipping
redundant lowercasing.

tui_screens/messages.rs: Autocomplete prefix match uses byte-level
eq_ignore_ascii_case instead of allocating lowercased copies.
prefixed_reply_subject uses byte-level case check for "Re:" prefix.

tui_screens/projects.rs: Filter and sort migrated to contains_ci/cmp_ci
helpers, eliminating per-comparison allocations.  Test string literals
use .to_string() consistently.

tui_screens/system_health.rs: New ATC Operator diagnostics section
showing enable status, tick/decision/deadlock counts, budget
utilization, degraded agent liveness, and notes.  New add_atc_findings
function surfaces diagnostic probe lines for safe-mode, deadlocks,
budget overruns, spawn failures, and per-agent liveness degradation.
Tests cover deadlock+budget+dead-agent and spawn-failure scenarios.

markdown.rs: Formatting fix for long conditional in data URI
sanitization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
